output.summary: Applied accessibility fixes and test page updates to FeaturedPost block. Fixed image alt text fallback (now uses empty string for decorative images), added aria-label to CTA links with post title context, fixed excerpt double-escaping, and updated test page with DemoContainer wrappers and self-closing block markup format.

changes: Line 107: Changed `esc_html()` to `wp_kses_post()` for excerpt to prevent double-escaping
Line 114: Added `aria-label` attribute to CTA link with format: `buttonLabel: postTitle` for better screen reader context
Line 152: Changed alt text fallback from `$postTitle` to empty string `''` to mark decorative images properly
filesModified.reasoning: Fixed accessibility issues identified in planning report: (1) Images whose content is conveyed by adjacent text should be decorative (alt="") per WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1. (2) CTA links need contextual aria-label per WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.4 to distinguish multiple Featured Post blocks on the same page. (3) Prevented double-escaping of HTML entities in excerpts.

changes: Line 335: Changed alt text fallback from `postTitle` to empty string `''` to sync with PHP
filesModified.reasoning: Synced TSX editor preview with PHP frontend rendering. Both now use empty string fallback for decorative images.

warnings: Asset size warnings (expected, not related to changes)

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP both use empty string alt fallback. PHP includes aria-label on link (editor preview doesn't need it since links aren't functional in editor).

testPage.formatUpdates: Converted from non-self-closing block markup with HTML wrappers to self-closing format (`/-->`). Added DemoContainer wrappers with titles and descriptions for each variation.

fixesApplied.description: Fixed image alt text fallback to use empty string for decorative images
Added aria-label to CTA button link with post title context
Synced TSX alt text fallback to match PHP (empty string)
Updated test page to use self-closing block markup and DemoContainer wrappers

notes: All accessibility issues from planning report have been resolved
TSX/PHP sync verified - both use empty string alt fallback for decorative images
Test page successfully updated with 10 variations, all wrapped in DemoContainer blocks
Build passed successfully with no TypeScript errors
Linter errors exist in other blocks but none introduced by these changes
